strings.settings.title: Setim
strings.settings.subtitle: Ol Laik bilong App
strings.lang.title: Tokples
strings.lang.intro: Ol bikpela tokples i stap pinis. Kisim yu tokples bilong yu bilong pulap tarnslesen i no nidim intanet — ol dispesriksen, stori bilong ol na moa.
strings.lang.failed: Kisim i no wok. Lukim koneksen na traim gen.
strings.settings.night.desc: Ret i strongpela i lukautim ai olsem i ting long tudak — ret lait i no bagarapim lukim long nait, na heven i sanap klia.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: I senisim i go ret otomatik taim heven i tudak bihain long san i go daun.
strings.settings.location.desc: Wanem ples bai heven i kaout long en.
strings.settings.haptics.desc: Sek taim yu lokat long wanpela samting.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Ritim aut target na gait long ples — bilong yusim nating han na ol man i no ken lukim.
strings.settings.fov.desc: Senis liklik bai lain bilong gaden sta na rot bilong satelait i makim tru heven.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.paywall.title: Opnim Olgeta Heven
strings.paywall.subtitle: Wanpela taim kisim. Nogat sabskripsen, nogat akant — yu nap long yu foeva, olgeta oflaen.
strings.paywall.feature.catalog: Olgeta sta, gaden sta na satelait
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Taim Masin — lukim heven long eniwan de
strings.paywall.feature.events: Ol samting heven — ilkips, ren bilong sta, putim wantaim
strings.paywall.comingSoon: Ol kisim bai opn sune — yusim kot bilong opnim nau.
strings.paywall.error: Wanpela samting i rong. Traim gen.
strings.paywall.restoreNone: Ol kisim bifo i no painim.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Makim wanpela target bilong painim long heven
strings.stars.title: Ol Sta
strings.stars.subtitle: Ol sta {n} nem i sain tumas
strings.deepsky.title: Heven Hevi
strings.deepsky.subtitle: Sta {n}, nebula, galaksi na klasta
strings.constellations.title: Ol Gaden Sta
strings.constellations.subtitle: {n} ol nambawan paten bilong sta
strings.satellites.title: Ol Satelait
strings.events.title: Ol Samting Heven
strings.events.subtitle: Wanem bai kamap — Savetim bilong traim taim
strings.search.name: Painim long nem…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: Nogat ol laik — Opim wanpela item, pres ★ bilong putim.
strings.list.empty.visible: Nating i antap horizon nau — Traim "Soim Olgeta".
strings.list.empty.search: Nating i fit long painim bilong yu.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: Nogat sta long lis antap horizon nau.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: Nogat heven hevi samting antap horizon nau.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: Nogat wan bilong ol gaden sta i antap horizon nau.
strings.sat.overheadShadow: Antap nau tasol long sado bilong Giraun
strings.sat.noPass: Nogat pas bai i lukim sune
strings.fav.empty:
Nogat ol laik.
Opim eniwan planet o sta, pres ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: Nogat wan bilong ol laik i antap horizon nau.
strings.fav.noMatch: Nogat laik i fit long painim bilong yu.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} i no antap nau — Pres infomesen bilong neks pas.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ Taim Traval: {when} — Pres bihain i go bek nau
strings.point.permBody: Planet Pointer i soim wanem poinim aro long laiv kamera video bilong makim {name}.
strings.info.passNote: Ples taim. Hait tumas = lait, isi pas.
strings.ev.lunarSub: Mun i go insait long sado bilong Giraun
strings.time.title: Taim Masin
strings.time.subtitle: Lukim heven long eniwan de o taim.
